title: Intelligence Community Analysis

fields.vision: Intelligence Community Analysis is an intelligence-enterprise map for understanding agencies, missions, collection disciplines, oversight, and analytic standards.
fields.mechanism: It routes the reader through mission, agency role, collection discipline, analytic production, oversight, and standards so claims about the intelligence community are tied to institutional function.
fields.built_components: Visible public components: 74 kept Evidence Sections, native navigation, Review Notes, source-use plan, APA lineage, and source lineage claim limit. The public package remains text-focused and does not claim unverified runtime state.
fields.source_utilization: Heuer. Loads cognitive-bias and intelligence-analysis failure modes. CIA Tradecraft Primer. Loads structured analytic technique selection and use conditions. Pherson and Pherson. Loads practical tradecraft: indicators, ACH, key assumptions, diagnosticity, and challenge procedures. Tetlock. Loads judgment calibration, forecasting humility, and expert-performance limits. Kahneman. Loads bias, heuristics, and slow/fast cognition as an error-control vocabulary. A page-family source-use record exists. Final citation strength still depends on page-specific passage review.
fields.plan: Plan: state the intelligence problem in plain language, name the structured method, define use conditions and failure modes, and attach source lineage for method and case claims. The project source notes below should be converted into authored subsections only after the page-specific claim limit and source-use decisions are settled.
fields.status: Status: native public port complete for upload and navigation; substantive source-project verification remains limited by the source lineage ceiling and the original project governance records. The page separates public presentation from project completion; completion depends on the status and remaining-gap fields.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: several method pages still need stronger distinction between coursework demonstration, live instrument, and fully validated professional workflow. The kept Evidence Sections below preserve project substance for close reading; final public prose should be authored from those signals rather than copied mechanically.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Intelligence Community Analysis is presented as a intelligence-method and security-analysis page. Its public purpose is to turn analytic tradecraft into inspectable public method: what question is being disciplined, which method is used, and what error the method is meant to reduce. Source lead: What is the likelihood that Venezuelan military leadership will withdraw support from Maduro within 6 months, and what indicators would signal this shift?
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from intelligence question to method selection, evidence weighting, competing hypotheses, bias control, judgment output, and review gate. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.

source_derived_signals.text: The consumer has asked their question. Your job as the intelligence manager is to translate this into a PIR that the collection and analysis communities can act on. The specificity of your requirement determines the focus of everything downstream.

The Iraq WMD failure began at the requirements stage: the question was framed as "confirm that Iraq has WMDs" rather than "what is the status of Iraq's WMD programs?" When requirements presume conclusions, the entire cycle is corrupted.

The 2002 NIE assessed with "high confidence" that Iraq had active WMD programs. The underlying evidence did not support high confidence — key sources were fabricated (CURVEBALL), corroboration was assumed rather than verified, and alternative hypotheses were not rigorously explored. ICD-203 was the direct reform response: confidence must be calibrated to evidence quality.

Raw reports have arrived from your collection assets. Not all are equally reliable — some are ambiguous, some contradictory. Evaluate each report's credibility before it passes to analysis. Use the DoD source reliability/information confidence matrix.

You will step through each of the six phases defined in Lowenthal's model. At each phase, your choices affect the quality score. Watch how early mistakes cascade — a vague requirement in Phase 1 degrades every subsequent phase.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Intelligence Community Analysis is an intelligence-enterprise map for understanding agencies, missions, collection disciplines, oversight, and analytic standards.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It routes the reader through mission, agency role, collection discipline, analytic production, oversight, and standards so claims about the intelligence community are tied to institutional function.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because intelligence work is not one generic activity; it is a system of roles, authorities, collection paths, and review obligations.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It matters because intelligence work is not one generic activity; it is a system of roles, authorities, collection paths, and review obligations.
